code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if has
      nums = list.push(nums, sign * cur)
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      has = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
    has = true
  else if b == 43
    sign = 1
    has = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  nums = list.push(nums, sign * cur)
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  let v_opt = nums.get(j)
  let v = match v_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let sq = v * v
  if j == 0
    out = "#{sq}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{sq}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
